data.title: Northern Tool + Equipment is Revving it Up with Monster Jam® Truck Appearance at Des Moines Store
data.description: Des Moines residents can take advantage of a special offer at the store event where they will get the opportunity to secure two complimentary tickets for the Monster Jam® event. This thrilling opportunity, brought by Northern Tool + Equipment, is set to ignite the excitement of the Des Moines community on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Zillow Group to highlight AI-native housing platform strategy at AI Summit for Investors
data.description: Zillow Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: Z and ZG) has recently held an AI Summit for Investors in Seattle on March 24, 2026. During the summit, the company reiterated its first-quarter and full-year outlook along with its mid-cycle targets. In addition to this reaffirmation, Zillow also introduced a new mid-cycle net income margin target. This update from the company comes as it continues to focus on providing transparency and guidance for stakeholders.

data.title: Fixify Publishes 2026 IT Help Desk Benchmark Report
data.description: A recent study of over 50,000 help desk tickets has shown that the use of AI automation results in a significant improvement in resolution times, delivering solutions 16 times faster. Fixify, a company specializing in AI-based IT automation, released its 2026 IT Help Desk Benchmark Report from Arlington, Virginia on March 24, 2026. This report provides a detailed analysis of the data, highlighting the efficiency gained through AI technology in IT support services.

data.title: INJ price hovers around $3.05, RSI at 47.36. Analysts eye $3.17 resistance test by week's end on momentum buildup.
data.description: The current price of Injective is $3.05, and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 47.36, indicating neutral territory. Based on technical analysis, there is a potential for the price to test the resistance level at $3.17 within the next week if momentum continues to increase.

data.title: New Survey of CEOs Reveals PR Investment Is Accelerating and Boosted by AI Search
data.description: According to the State of PR 2026 Report by Delight Labs, earned media is now seen as a main tactic for AI citation, leading to 92% of executives boosting PR investments following AI-powered search. The report, from a boutique PR agency catering to growth firms, highlights the growing importance of earned media in PR strategies. This data reflects a significant shift towards leveraging AI in PR efforts, signaling a trend that 92% of executives are actively responding to by increasing their PR spending.

data.title: The Typical U.S. Home Sale Costs Over $20,000 in Realtor Fees in 2026
data.description: According to a recent nationwide agent survey by Clever, commission rates have hit a five-year peak, showing an increase of approximately 0.25% from the previous year. As of 2026, the average total real estate commission rate stands at 5.70%, marking a notable uptick from 5.44% in 2025. This data was released in a report from St. Louis on March 24, 2026.

data.title: TrustArc Welcomes Updates to Global CBPR Program Requirements, Strengthening Global Privacy Interoperability
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in San Francisco, TrustArc, a leading privacy certification provider, announced its support for the revised Global Cross-Border Privacy Rules (CBPR) Program Requirements (PR) unveiled by the Global Forum Assembly (GFA). TrustArc, known for its TRUSTe certification services, will be implementing these updated standards to ensure compliance and data privacy across borders.

data.title: Polyrizon Intends to Acquire up to 20% Stake in Colugo, Developer of Advanced eVTOL Drones for Defense and Urban Air Mobility Applications
data.description: A non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) has been signed by the Company with shareholders of Colugo, a notable organization with clients such as the Israel Defense Forces, national first responder groups, and various commercial enterprises.

data.title: Ellenby Technologies Inc. Acquires Assets of InOne Technology LLC
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Woodbury Heights, N.J., Ellenby Technologies Inc. disclosed the acquisition of InOne Technology LLC's assets, finalized on March 15, 2026. This deal incorporates InOne's product range and operations into Ellenby, enhancing their overall business.

data.title: New e-Book Shows Why Australia Is a Prime Growth Market for U.S. e-Tailers
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Philadelphia, a press release was issued by Asendia USA through PRNewswire about their latest e-book titled "Selling Down Under: A U.S. Guide to Australia's Growing e-Commerce Market." This e-book is aimed at U.S. e-tailers seeking to enhance their cross-border approach globally. It provides valuable insights into the expanding e-commerce market in Australia, offering strategic guidance on tapping into this market. The e-book serves as a comprehensive resource for U.S. businesses interested in expanding their online retail presence in Australia.

data.title: Early Bird Is Officially Landing in Sioux Falls, SD
data.description: A new location of the popular brunch spot Early Bird, known for its unique and lively brunch experience, is set to open in Sioux Falls, South Dakota in the fall of 2026. The announcement was made on March 24th, 2026. This expansion signifies a significant milestone for the brand, as it will be adding its presence to the city for the first time.

data.title: Best Western Plus Pepper Tree Inn Santa Barbara Converts to Marriott Lifestyle Brand
data.description: A hotel in Santa Barbara, formerly known as Best Western Plus Pepper Tree Inn, has been transformed into a FOUND Hotels, Santa Barbara, Series by Marriott property as part of Hawkins Way Capital's portfolio. The conversion was announced on March 24, 2026. This change signifies a rebranding effort in the hospitality industry in Santa Barbara.

data.title: Clean Eatz Kitchen Publishes 2026 Prepared Meal Delivery Industry Report Comparing Seven National Services on Price, Nutrition, and Flexibility
data.description: A recent analysis shows that the prepared meal delivery market is predominantly characterized by high prices and compulsory subscriptions. The study revealed that the actual monthly expenses for identical meal quantities vary between $333 and $580. Clean Eatz Kitchen, a prominent player in this market, was highlighted in the research.

data.title: Supermetrics Data Shows Campaign Optimization Ranks Last in AI Adoption Among Retail, E-commerce and CPG Brands
data.description: In Helsinki on March 24, 2026, Supermetrics, a Marketing Intelligence Platform used by numerous marketing teams globally, unveiled insights from its 2026 Marketing Data Report. The report focuses on the utilization of artificial intelligence by retailers, e-commerce businesses, and CPG/FMCG marketers. Supermetrics' findings present crucial data for these industries and are based on extensive research.

data.title: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on AMZN, AAOI, HL and IBM
data.description: New York - On March 24, 2026, Tradr ETFs introduced four pioneering leveraged ETFs focused on individual stocks, such as blue-chip giants Amazon.com and IBM. These first-of-their-kind funds cater to experienced investors and traders, offering unique strategies. The ETFs are listed on Cboe, marking an innovative step in the market.

data.title: Pendo Lands on the 2026 Fast Company Most Innovative Companies List for "Breakthrough Launch" of Agent Analytics
data.description: Pendo, a product intelligence company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has been included in the prestigious annual list of global innovators alongside tech giants such as Google, Nvidia, and Adidas. The company was recognized in the Enterprise category of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies of 2026. This acknowledgment comes as Pendo continues to make waves in the industry with its groundbreaking products and strategies. The accolade highlights Pendo's significant achievements in 2025, solidifying its position among the top innovators in the world.

data.title: SGS, with CertX, Now Offering Expanded DIGITAL TRUST Services to Strengthen AI-Powered and Autonomous System Compliance in Safety-Driven Industries
data.description: SGS, a global leader in testing, inspection, and certification, is expanding its involvement in the NVIDIA 'Halos Systems Inspection Lab' ecosystem in ZUG, Switzerland. In a recent announcement on March 24, 2026, SGS revealed plans to increase its efforts in inspection, assessment, and certification activities. This move comes on the heels of the company's successful participation in the NVIDIA program. The specifics of the expansion, including the exact scale and the anticipated impact, have not been disclosed.

data.title: Littelfuse to Host 2026 Investor Day
data.description: In Chicago, Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFUS) has disclosed plans to hold an Investor Day in New York City on Thursday, May 14, 2026. The event will feature Greg Henderson, President and CEO, Abhi Khandelwal, Executive Vice President and CFO, and other key executives presenting a detailed analysis of the company's business strategy, growth factors, and financial goals. This event aims to provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's operations and future prospects.

data.title: Compliant Cannabis Seed Websites on Wix Are Switching Payment Processors
data.description: Scarborough, Maine - On March 24, 2026, Organic Payment Gateways revealed its introduction of validated, customized payment processing integrations for cannabis seed businesses in the US that adhere to the Farm Bill, and run e-commerce platforms on Wix. This innovative service caters to meet the needs of a specific industry sector, providing solutions for businesses operating within legal guidelines.

data.title: Minimalist Grocery Design Resonates with Price-Conscious Shoppers
data.description: Designers from HFA Architecture + Engineering recommend that grocers looking to attract today's price-conscious shoppers should consider using polished concrete floors, metal shelving, and open store layouts to convey a message of value. This advice comes from a recent report released in Bentonville, Arkansas on March 24, 2026. These design elements aim to communicate to customers that 'value is to be found here.' This strategy is particularly relevant as more shoppers seek products that offer affordability, with numbers showing a growing trend towards price-conscious buying behaviors in the market.
